Instructional Integrity Studio

Cognitive safety for instruction systems

HomeEvaluateHistory
Evidence-first evaluations
View evaluation history

Artifact evaluation

Audience: Safety Evaluator — submit text or markdown, upload UTF-8 files, or run seeded samples. Each run persists criterion evidence, cognitive-safety failure classes, and remediation (Article VI).

Evaluate an artifact

Audience: Safety Evaluator — paste text, upload a file, or run a seeded sample (Article VI).

Sample library

Preloaded artifacts for immediate runs (§8.2).

Audience: Safety Evaluator — samples demonstrate cognitive-safety failure patterns (Article VI).

Upload

UTF-8 .txt / .md only; validated server-side.

Server validates MIME type, extension, size, and UTF-8 encoding (§6.1).

Latest result

Inspectable structure — no black-box summary (§19).

Run an evaluation to see verdict, failure classes, and a preview of evidence-backed criteria.

UI build target: learn the framework, evaluate artifacts, and move directly into implementation packages.
